extract: Muddy Water (Japanese: だくりゅう Muddy Stream) is a damage-dealing Water-type move introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation IV, it was the signature move of Marshtomp and Swampert. It is: TR45 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM209 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM140 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
